title: Couscous Salad
excerpt: Ingredients 750 ml boiling hot chicken stock 500 ml couscous 100 ml finely chopped dried apricots, soaked in rooibos tea and drained 100 ml finely chopped dates 100 ml toasted flaked almonds 60 ml honey 30 ml lemon juice 10 ml ground cinnamon fresh mint leaves Method Place the couscous in a bowl and pour the chicken stock …
html:
Ingredients

  • 750 ml boiling hot chicken stock
  • 500 ml couscous
  • 100 ml finely chopped dried apricots, soaked in rooibos tea and drained
  • 100 ml finely chopped dates
  • 100 ml toasted flaked almonds
  • 60 ml honey
  • 30 ml lemon juice
  • 10 ml ground cinnamon
  • fresh mint leaves

Method

Place the couscous in a bowl and pour the chicken stock over it. Cover with cling wrap and let it stand for 10 minutes.

Fluff it up with a fork and stir in the apricots, dates and almonds.

Mix the ground cinnamon, honey and lemon juice and stir through the couscous.

Break the mint leaves with your hands and stir through the couscous.

Easy!
